summary: /phantom navigation refactored terminal-like. /phantom (no arg) always lands at workspace level even with a single brand (previously short-circuited to brand mode when N=1). /phantom {slug} drills into a brand. /phantom {slug} {entity} new entity-drill mode (audiences/angles/products/offers/strategy/learnings) for dense per-entity zoom. NEXT SUGGESTED blocks across all modes now ship paste-ready commands (single back-tick wrap, copyable verbatim) instead of conversational suggestions. Operator learns the system the way they learn cd and ls : top-down, never short-circuited.
